title: Smithing+
description: Upgrade all your gear from leather > iron >gold>diamond>netherite
body:
Upgrade all your gear from leather > iron >gold>diamond>netherite
Have you ever had a huge stock of iron tools or gold tools with good enchantments? now you can upgrade them!

*It maintains enchantments*

**Recepies:**



**Leather > Iron**

Iron ingot + equipment + Iron Block

**Iron > Gold**

Gold ingot + tool/equipment + Gold block

**Gold > Diamond**

Diamond + tool/equipment + Diamond Block
